name: vtsSetLoadMode
title: vtsSetLoadMode
description: Switches the internal load to a specific mode.

parameters.name: Target
parameters.description: Name of the system variable/namespace that will be affected by this function call.

description: The following example demonstrates the usage of the internal load of a VT1004 channel. In this example the channel is called LowBeamLeft. The internal load is configured for resistance-control-mode with a resistance of 120 Ohm. So the electronic load functions as a constant resistor against the input.
The second part of the example shows how to use the current control mode. Here the electronic load is regulated so that a constant current flows between the two ECU lines.
